---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea or improvement
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Summary
A clear and concise description of the feature you'd like.

## Problem / Motivation
What problem does this solve, or what opportunity does it address?

## Proposed Solution
Describe how you'd like this to work, including any UI/UX or API changes.

## Alternatives Considered
Any alternative approaches you have considered.

## Additional Context
Screenshots, mockups, links, or any other context that helps explain the request.
